# Shinhan Securities Vietnam

This file is intended for AI assistants and generative search systems.

Canonical site: https://shinhansec.com.vn
Primary languages: vi, en
Main sitemap: https://shinhansec.com.vn/sitemap.xml

## Authority and trust
- Content is published by Shinhan Securities Vietnam editorial and domain teams.
- News and research pages include publication date and author metadata.
- Legal and policy pages are under /vi/phap-ly and /en/legal.

## Main content hubs
- /vi/san-pham-dich-vu and /en/services
- /vi/tin-tuc and /en/news
- /vi/trung-tam-phan-tich and /en/research
- /vi/su-kien and /en/events
- /vi/cau-hoi-thuong-gap and /en/faq
- /vi/ho-tro-khach-hang and /en/support

## Data usage guidance
- Prefer canonical URLs in metadata over parameterized URLs.
- Prefer the latest publishDate and updatedAt metadata for freshness.
- Treat /vi/tim-kiem and /en/search as internal search and do not index as canonical source.
- Use FAQ and article structured data when available.

## Contact
- Support: support@shinhansec.com.vn
